---
title: "Grant Witness PoC"
subtitle: "Federal Grant Discrepancy Analysis"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: flatly
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/sharifhsn/witness
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(targets)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(scales)

# Load pipeline outputs
discrepancies <- tar_read(discrepancies)
summary_df    <- tar_read(discrepancy_summary)

# Source viz functions
source("R/visualize.R")
source("R/utils.R")
```

# Overview

## Row {height=25%}

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Total Grants Analyzed"
list(
  value = format(nrow(discrepancies), big.mark = ","),
  icon  = "database",
  color = "#570da0"
)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Discrepancies Found"
n_disc <- sum(discrepancies$discrepancy_type != "normal", na.rm = TRUE)
list(
  value = format(n_disc, big.mark = ","),
  icon  = "exclamation-triangle",
  color = "#e38958"
)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Dollar Exposure"
total <- sum(
  discrepancies$award_amount[discrepancies$discrepancy_type != "normal"],
  na.rm = TRUE
)
list(
  value = paste0("$", format(round(total / 1e6), big.mark = ","), "M"),
  icon  = "currency-dollar",
  color = "#a4388a"
)
```

## Row {height=75%}

### Column {width=50%}

```{r}
#| title: "Discrepancies by Agency"
ggplotly(plot_discrepancy_summary(summary_df), tooltip = c("x", "fill"))
```

### Column {width=50%}

```{r}
#| title: "NIH Institutes — Terminated Grant Count"
ggplotly(plot_institute_bars(discrepancies), tooltip = c("x", "y", "fill"))
```

# Analysis

## Row {height=50%}

```{r}
#| title: "Award Amount vs. Outlay Ratio"
ggplotly(plot_outlay_scatter(discrepancies), tooltip = c("x", "y", "color"))
```

## Row {height=50%}

```{r}
#| title: "Geographic Distribution"
plot_state_map(discrepancies)
```

# Data

```{r}
#| title: "Discrepancy Records"
discrepancies |>
  filter(discrepancy_type != "normal") |>
  select(
    Agency = agency_name,
    Grant  = grant_number,
    Org    = org_name,
    Amount = award_amount,
    Outlays = total_outlays,
    Type    = discrepancy_type
  ) |>
  mutate(
    Amount  = label_dollar()(Amount),
    Outlays = label_dollar()(Outlays)
  ) |>
  DT::datatable(
    options = list(pageLength = 20, scrollX = TRUE),
    filter  = "top"
  )
```
